category_sources: Official ttf2pt1 homepage describes TTF2PT1 as converting TrueType and other FreeType-supported fonts to Adobe Type 1 files.
source_facts.description states this is a TrueType Font to Postscript Type 1 converter.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses ttf2pt1/TTF2PT1 for the project.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the project's documentation and navigation surface.
Official ttf2pt1 SourceForge site hosts the README with command usage and options.
repo_sources: Official ttf2pt1 site links a SourceForge CVS repository as the project source-control location.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official README documents command-line conversion options and font formats.
